message:
perf(core/search): Precompute term frequency in BM25 index

Optimize BM25 search performance by precomputing term frequency maps
during index building rather than computing them during each search query.

Changes to BM25Document interface:
- Added termFreq: Map<string, number> field for O(1) term frequency lookup

Changes to buildIndex():
- Now computes term frequency map during document indexing
- Each document's termFreq map stores token -> count mappings
- Eliminates need for array.filter().length in hot search path

Performance impact:
- Index build: O(n) additional work per document (one-time cost)
- Search query: O(1) per term lookup vs O(n) array scan previously
- Significant speedup for large prompts with repeated terms

This optimization follows the standard BM25 implementation pattern where
document statistics are precomputed at index time for efficient retrieval.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
